name: complex-pipe-modification
instruction: Modify `summarize` to: 1) filter out items with price <= 0, 2) group remaining items would be too complex so instead just add a step after sort that takes only the first 3 items using `list.take`. Keep everything else the same.
layer3_hint: Available: `list.take(xs, n)` returns the first n elements, `list.filter(xs, fn(x) => bool)` filters elements
